The question of **better value** really depends on what you prioritize—budget or breadth of functionality.

### Budget Focus: StreamLine ($49/month)
If your primary concern is keeping costs low, **StreamLine** wins easily at $49 per month. It offers solid core functionality and still maintains a respectable user rating of 4.2 out of 5 stars.

### Feature & UX Focus: ProFlow ($79/month)
If you have a more complex workflow and can absorb the extra $30 monthly premium, **ProFlow** provides superior value: 25 native integrations vs 10, 4.7/5 stars vs 4.2/5 stars, and iOS+Android vs iOS-only mobile.
